= length

Returns the length of an array, object, or string

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo_len = this.foo.length()

# In:  {"foo":"hello world"}
# Out: {"foo_len":11}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo_len = this.foo.length()

# In:  {"foo":["first","second"]}
# Out: {"foo_len":2}

# In:  {"foo":{"first":"bar","second":"baz"}}
# Out: {"foo_len":2}
----
